resposta:
solution: 
```class Solution:
    def trailingZeroes(self, n: int) -> int:
        count = 0
        i = 5
        while n // i >= 1:
            count += n // i
            i *= 5
        return count
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log(n))
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses a while loop to divide n by powers of 5, effectively counting the number of trailing zeroes in n!. The loop runs in logarithmic time complexity due to the division by increasing powers of 5.
